/CAL:CLARIFICATION OF DISPOSITION/X:BY ORDER OF THIS COURT, DEFENDANT WASTO BE RELEASED FROM CUSTODY ON APRIL 23, 2020 IN THIS MATTER AS WELL AS CASE #02498475 AND CASE #13012711,/X:UPON RECEIPT OF THE NECESSARY PAPERWORKFROM THE COURT, THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT FAILED TO RELEASE THE DEFENDANT FROM CUSTODY AND CITED CASE #11029286 AS PREVENTING, FOR UNEXPLAINED REASONS, DEFENDANT'S RELEASE FROM CUSTODY/X:UPON INVESTIGATION, IT WAS DETERMINED CASE #11029286, A PROBATION CASE, HAD BEEN TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL IN APRIL, 2012 AND, IN MARCH 2019, WAS DISMISSED AND THE CHARGES ORDERED SEALED,/CTORD:IN LIGHT OF THE ABOVE, THE DEFENDANT IS TO BE RELEASED FROM CUSTODY CONSISTENT WITH THE COURT'S ORDER OF 04-23-20/
